questions.text: The focal length of a plane mirror is:
questions.explanation: A plane mirror can be considered as a spherical mirror with infinite radius, hence infinite focal length.

questions.text: For a concave mirror, when object is at focus, image is formed at infinity.
questions.explanation: When object is at focus of concave mirror, reflected rays are parallel and image is formed at infinity.

questions.text: The power of a lens is measured in ________.
questions.explanation: Power of lens P = 1/f (in meters). Unit is Dioptre (D).

questions.correctAnswer: When light travels from denser to rarer medium at angle greater than critical angle, it reflects back into denser medium. This is total internal reflection.
questions.explanation: TIR is used in optical fibers, diamond sparkle, and mirage formation.
